title: Movie Genre Classification
scenario: Ask the model to classify a movie as either 'action', 'comedy', 'drama', or 'romance' based on a brief description. The description should be under 50 words and include a specific movie title.
constraints: Include a specific movie title (e.g. 'The Avengers', 'The Shawshank Redemption')

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the model output correctly classify the movie genre?
Does the response include a specific movie title?
